title: Expense Reimbursement Process and Submission Deadlines
text:
Q: What is the process for submitting expense reimbursements and what are the deadlines?
A: To submit an expense reimbursement, employees must complete the expense report form available on the company intranet. All receipts must be attached to the report, and the report should be submitted to your direct supervisor for approval. Once approved, it will be forwarded to the finance department for processing. The deadline for submitting expense reports is within 30 days of the expense being incurred. Late submissions may result in denial of reimbursement. Please ensure that all expenses comply with the company's expense policy to avoid any issues.
